name: cannibal.live_world_day_smoke_persistence_mcw
description: Scenario 6 save/writeback half for cannibal camp night-raid live matrix: create a real daylight smoke cannibal stalk/dispatch active group through the live signal/local-gate path, then prove a guarded save writes the active cannibal group/profile/target/lead state into dimension_data.gsav. Attempt-2 proof deliberately gates the save on saved-file mtime rather than OCR because the ASCIITiles save-prompt capture was visually captured but OCR-garbled in attempt 1. Frau attempt-3 guidance: live smoke lead-state for this packet is persisted `known_recent_marks`, not `intelligence_map.leads`.

steps.label: post_load_day_smoke_persistence_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams cannibal day-smoke persistence fixture; this is startup/load plus before-action screen proof, not persistence closure by itself
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later smoke/dispatch/save artifacts cannot be credited.

steps.label: pass_one_turn_to_create_active_cannibal_smoke_group
steps.expected_visible_fact: one player pass-turn input has completed on the daylight smoke fixture; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact showing cannibal_camp active_job=stalk, pack_size=2, signal_packet=live_smoke, shakedown=no, and combat_forward=no
steps.failure_rule: If the pass-turn input is unproven or the same-run artifact lacks the cannibal smoke local-gate line, persistence save proof cannot be credited.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_cannibal_persistence_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after active cannibal group creation and before the guarded save/writeback

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_active_cannibal_smoke_group
steps.expected_visible_fact: a save-and-quit prompt request is issued after the active cannibal smoke group is created; the prompt screenshot is recorded, and trust is deferred to the following uppercase-Y save/writeback mtime gate because OCR is unreliable on this tiny ASCIITiles prompt
steps.failure_rule: If the subsequent uppercase-Y confirmation does not advance the saved-player mtime, this prompt/request row cannot be credited.

steps.label: confirm_save_after_active_cannibal_smoke_group
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is trusted only if audit_player_save_mtime_after_cannibal_persistence_save proves same-run writeback; otherwise this row is red by dependency
steps.next_step_gate: saved bandit_live_world metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_cannibal_persistence_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: uppercase Y follows the recorded save prompt/request so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_cannibal_persistence_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the cannibal persistence save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed cannibal persistence save, proving the following saved dimension-data audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_bandit_live_world_after_cannibal_persistence_save
steps.abort_reason: saved dimension-data bandit_live_world metadata did not contain the active cannibal smoke group/profile/target/member plus known_recent_marks signal state after same-run save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved dimension-data metadata contains a cannibal_camp active stalk group with at least two active members, player target, and persisted known_recent_marks live_smoke signal state; intelligence_map.leads are not claimed for this packet

evidence_contract.claim: a real live cannibal smoke/stalk active group saves active profile/member/target state plus known_recent_marks live-smoke signal state through the normal guarded save/writeback path
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for cannibal persistence
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No persistence credit if startup/load, active smoke group artifact, save request/confirmation ledger, uppercase-Y writeback mtime, or saved bandit_live_world active-state metadata with known_recent_marks live_smoke signal state is missing or non-green. Prompt OCR is not used as the guard for this scenario because the ASCIITiles prompt screenshot can OCR-garble; writeback mtime is the trust gate. intelligence_map.leads=[] is out of scope for this cannibal packet and must not be credited as camp-map lead proof. Post-load runtime continuation remains a separate reload proof if not paired with a follow-up no-fixture load.
